creator: sysadmin@wirefire.com
text:
After building a SMP capable kernel I began to recieve this error, at first with 512m ram, it happened after about 3 days uptime. I installed 1gig of ram and I get this error after about 1 hr. runtime. Initially this machine was running Squid 2.1, thought it might be squid so I upgraded to 2.2, still get the same thing!!

How-To-Repeat: Dual PII-350mhz CPU
1 gig PC-100 ECC RAM
Squid 2.1 or 2.2
6 Ultra SCSI Seagate HD's
httpd 5 max children
cron
syslogd
